message:
fix(runtime): fail-close browser boundary on invalid profile IDs

Add bounds checks for profile IDs in asx_surface_available,
asx_surface_blocked_count, and asx_surface_available_count so that
out-of-range values expose no surfaces instead of falling through
to the permissive non-browser path. Update header doc comments to
document the fail-closed contract and add two unit tests covering
the new guard clauses.

Closes bd-o1uc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
